title: rubus × amphichlorus
intro: Rubus × amphichlorus, also known as the black raspberry, is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, combining the characteristics of black raspberries and purple raspberries. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial compounds that have been shown to have potential health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus × amphichlorus include reducing the risk of certain cancers, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Rubus × amphichlorus can be prepared as a tea, jam, or supplement, with the berries often being freeze-dried or powdered for use in herbal preparations.
